{"tool": "python_exec", "arguments": {
    "code": "import math, random, numpy as np\n\
             p = np.array([0.5, 0.5, 0.5]) # random point in triangle\n\
             a, b, c = np.array([1, 1, sqrt(2)]) # side lengths\n\
             s = (b + c + 2 * a) / 2 # semiperimeter\n\
             area_apb = (4 * area_triangle(p, a, b) * area_triangle(p, b, c) / s)\n\
             area_acp = (4 * area_triangle(p, a, c) * area_triangle(p, c, b) / s)\n\
             area_bcp = (4 * area_triangle(a, b, c) / 2)\n\
             return (area_apb > area_acp and area_apb < area_bcp)"
}}
